1057.issue: [E1057] admin 6.17.14 listed as dependency but 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please update globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/io-package.json).

4043.issue: [E4043] Incorrect schema URL for jsonConfig files in .vscode/settings.json. Expected: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.admin/master/packages/jsonConfig/schemas/jsonConfig.json", found: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ioBroker/adapter-react-v5/main/schemas/jsonConfig.json"

5039.issue: [W5039] "admin/words.js" found but not referenced anywhere. File seems to be outdated, please consider removing it.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "tls" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:tls" instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (lib/client.js, lib/server.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/io-package.json).

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#603] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/issues/603)

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

9006.issue: [S9006] .commitinfo file should be excluded by .gitignore, please add a line with text ".commitinfo" to .gitignore

0029.issue: [E0029] Node.js 20 is required as minimum, node.js 22 is recommended. Please change "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '18' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/package.json).

0036.issue: [E0036] @iobroker/testing 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.2 is required as minimum,  5.2.2 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/package.json)

0065.issue: [S0065] No devDependency for "@types/node" found. Consider adding "@types/node":">=18" to devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/package.json).

0069.issue: [W0069] The following dependencies require a node.js version incompatible with the adapter's minimum (node 18): fast-unique-numbers (requires node: ">=18.2.0"). Please increase the engines.node requirement at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/package.json) or update/replace the incompatible dependencies.
